name: connection-finder
description: Nightly 3am. Finds non-obvious connections between recently created/modified notes and the rest of the vault. Strengthens the knowledge graph.
prompt: Run vault-link. Target: notes created or modified in last 7 days. Search entire vault for non-obvious connections. Respect user's permission level (conservative/moderate/aggressive). Generate connection report. Write to wiki/journal/sync-logs/YYYY-MM-DD-link.md.
